name: context-loader-quality
description: Tests that context loading is efficient and relevant

criteria.name: loads_core
criteria.check: output confirms CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md were checked

criteria.name: selective_loading
criteria.description: Only loads task-relevant memory files, not everything
criteria.check: output does NOT load all memory files indiscriminately

criteria.name: summarizes_context
criteria.description: Provides concise summary of loaded context
criteria.check: output ends with brief summary of what was loaded and key facts

criteria.name: respects_token_budget
criteria.check: does not load excessive context for simple tasks
